positive: A sophisticated, minimalist jungle biome design. The scene features stylized silhouettes of tropical flora, such as palm fronds, monstera leaves, and exotic ferns, arranged in a symmetrical, repeating pattern. Incorporate subtle abstract geometric elements derived from nature, like delicate hexagonal patterns intersecting the leaf outlines. The style should be sophisticated botanical illustration meets modern flat graphic design, emphasizing clean lines and negative space. Use a limited, high-contrast color palette of deep forest emerald, muted terracotta, and creamy off-white. The composition must be centered and highly scalable for fabric printing, with strong visual impact and excellent definition. Clean vector aesthetic, graphic novel quality, highly detailed silhouette art.
negative: photorealistic, blurry, noisy, text, watermark, logo, signature, dirty, low contrast, extra limbs, bad anatomy, grain, artifacts
